scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key patterns: accessing specific remote unit data via event.unit, iterating over relation.units, and accessing own app/unit databags. Correctly notes read-only constraint on remote bags.
scores.hallucination_notes: Uses 'RelationDataError' which doesn't appear in the gold standard and may not be the actual exception name. Also mentions 'model.get_relation()' which is valid but not in gold standard. Missing the Relation.load() / dataclass pattern from gold standard.
